researchSkipReason: All gaps are in-house Rust corrections or a port+in-memory adapter following the existing TaskStore pattern; no external library, framework, or skeleton is a candidate. Sibling contracts source-verified directly this phase.

build_required.summary: Fix fpa-forge REST insert path to POST /{schema}/{table} (no /rest prefix, schema segment required)
Agent-owned ProjectStore port (trait) + in-memory adapter for the nested Project aggregate; durable backend deferred
Gate write-kind guard: application.deploy (and any Gate write kind) must refuse, not fall through to list_routes
JWKS single-flight refresh (tokio::sync::Mutex) to close the double-fetch window
Surface signature_verified in the task audit record (thread through AuthContext)
Integration test harness (Rust tests/ + wiremock + axum test client + in-test RSA JWKS) exercising authenticate -> project.create -> list_routes -> fabric.health across AG-UI/A2A/MCP
